C 09.01.name: C 09.01 – Geographical breakdown of exposures by residence of the obligor: SA exposures (CR GB 1)
C 09.01.description: Reports the geographical breakdown of standardised approach exposures by the residence of the obligor.
C 09.01.section_heading: C 09.01 – Geographical breakdown of exposures by residence of the obligor: SA exposures (CR GB 1)
